name: Wedding Planning
student_summary: Run India's biggest private events — the big fat wedding industry.
overview: Run India's biggest private events — the big fat wedding industry. Wedding Planning sits in the Events family of Hospitality, Tourism & Event Management. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You draw energy from working closely with people
You notice the small things others miss
who_should_avoid: You want a laptop-anywhere lifestyle — this work happens in person
daily_responsibilities: Apply concept & décor planning to real problems
Collaborate with your team using vendor networks
Keep improving at budgeting — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Venues and event floors — evenings and weekends included
problem_solving_style: People-centred — listen, mediate, guide and align humans
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: A broad Events foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Location-bound work; postings and relocation are part of the deal
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Wedding Planning is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A project demonstrating concept & décor planning
A documented case study of vendor networks
projects: Beginner: explore concept & décor planning with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Planning tools
smaller_city_scope: Viable in smaller cities — demand exists well beyond the metros.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Event Management: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Hospitality Operations & Hotel Management: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Photography: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Wedding Planning pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹15 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Any, Home Science. Typical degrees: Any degree + event training, Portfolio of events. Alternatives exist: skill diplomas + on-floor experience ladder.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Wedding Planning evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Wedding Planning is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
